note: First tag stamps the Plane-B nginx site template as already shipped and consumed (voice pinned it pre-tag @ 37dcac5, byte-identical to this tag — its PIN.json fills version/tag at its next re-pin). v1 is the two-server-block shape: :8081 public provisioning bootstrap (ca.crt, CSR PUT + cert poll), :443 mTLS operational zone (/esp32/firmware/, /esp32/models/, optional /ws/ reverse proxy passing X-Client-Cert-DN).
